task_completion.description: Navigate to the Edit Product page for the target product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Edit Product' page is open in WordPress/WooCommerce with the title 'USB-C Laptop Charger 65W' visible in the title field.

task_completion.description: Access the Linked Products configuration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Linked Products' tab is selected within the 'Product data' meta box.
The 'Upsells' input field contains 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (or SKU: WBH-001) as a selected product tag.

task_completion.description: Configure the first required Cross-sell product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Cross-sells' input field contains 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' (or SKU: OCT-BLK-M) as a selected product tag.

task_completion.description: Configure the second required Cross-sell product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Cross-sells' input field contains 'Slim Fit Denim Jeans' (or SKU: SFDJ-BLU-32) as a selected product tag.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Product updated.' success message is visible at the top of the screen, or the 'Update' button in the Publish meta box has been clicked after entering the linked products.

integrity.description: The agent used the WooCommerce web interface to configure the products.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the WordPress/WooCommerce admin dashboard, not a terminal window executing WP-CLI or database commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual WooCommerce application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface contains standard WordPress admin menus, WooCommerce styling, and functional input fields, rather than a text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not alter unrelated product data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The product title ('USB-C Laptop Charger 65W') and other visible fields remain unchanged from their original state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target product to edit: 'USB-C Laptop Charger 65W' (SKU: USBC-065). Required Upsell: 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001) - exactly 1 expected. Required Cross-sells: 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' (SKU: OCT-BLK-M) and 'Slim Fit Denim Jeans' (SKU: SFDJ-BLU-32) - exactly 2 expected. WooCommerce typically displays these in the Linked Products tab as tags containing the product name and/or SKU.
